title: Pin the sbt build for reproducibility
description: Fix sbt, Scala, plugin, and dependency versions so the build resolves identically across machines and CI.
body: Use when configuring or changing an sbt build. Do not use dynamic version ranges (latest.release, +) or float the sbt/Scala version. Actions: pin sbt in project/build.properties, set a single scalaVersion, fix plugin versions in project/plugins.sbt, and pin library dependency versions in build.sbt; let coursier cache resolve deterministically. Validation signals include a clean sbt compile/test on a fresh checkout producing the same resolved graph, verified by sbt dependencyTree or a lock plugin. Risk boundary: a dynamic version range makes the build non-reproducible and can pull a breaking release silently into CI or production; treat any latest/+ version as a defect to pin.
